sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11110" key="a)oidoqe/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀοιδο-θέτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n11110.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lyric poet,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.50</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archim.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
